rationale: Ground truth is essentially empty (a bot rate-limit notice and a bare 'lgtm' approval), so recall is trivially satisfied by both. Both candidates correctly verify this is a pure rename with no logic change and both cite the same upstream evidence (basic.py:23) confirming the new name matches what upstream reads. X's APPROVE verdict better matches the actual human outcome and its verification is more concrete (grep count of remaining occurrences, upstream cross-check), though its citation of an unverifiable upstream PR number (vllm#46022) is a minor ungrounded flourish. Y's one substantive comment—suggesting a comment or a 'targeted test' for paths that X shows are already covered by the updated existing tests—is vague and only weakly actionable.
